title: Sennes Mountains
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sennes Mountains''' were a range of high, snow-covered peaks on the frigid world of [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]], north of the city of [[Rhire]] and abutted by the [[Zirfan glacier|Zirfan Glacier]]. The mountains extended down below the glacier into the oceans underneath the polar ice.<ref name="Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
